descriptions.name: Tim
descriptions.core:
- Skilled craftsman running a small woodworking shop.
- Creates high-quality handmade furniture with precision and care.
- Takes pride in craftsmanship and lasting design.
- Enjoys working with different types of wood and improving his techniques.
- Loves watching football and spending time with friends after work.
- Finds satisfaction in seeing his work become part of people’s lives.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Currently building a custom dining table for a local café.
- Wants to try a new wood finishing technique on the next piece.
- Thinking about asking a friend to watch the next football match together.

descriptions.name: Amy
descriptions.core:
- Passionate teacher dedicated to inspiring students every day.
- Believes knowledge is the key to opportunity and growth.
- Enjoys literature, history, and science — always finding ways to make learning engaging.
- Loves reading and discovering new ideas to bring into her classroom.
- Hikes and takes photographs in her free time.
- Feels connected to nature and uses it as creative inspiration.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Preparing a new lesson plan and looking for a fun classroom activity.
- Wants to go on a photo walk soon if the weather stays nice.
- Considering recommending a book to a colleague or student.

descriptions.name: Gabriel
descriptions.core:
- 32-year-old history teacher with a love for storytelling and analysis.
- Enjoys reading historical novels and connecting past events to modern life.
- Has deep, reflective conversations and values diverse perspectives.
- Likes debating ideas and learning through discussion.
- Passionate football fan and enjoys cheering for his favorite team.
- Finds peace in hiking and nature on weekends.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Thinking about starting a small local history discussion group.
- Wants to plan a weekend hike and invite someone along.
- Curious about a recent historical topic and plans to read more about it.

descriptions.name: John
descriptions.core:
- 28-year-old software developer focused on technology and innovation.
- Enthusiastic about AI and the future of machine learning.
- Enjoys discussing new tech trends and sharing ideas with others.
- Plays basketball and listens to classic ‘80s music in his free time.
- Curious and energetic conversationalist with a slightly competitive streak.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Trying to beat his personal best score in an online game.
- Thinking about a small side project idea related to AI.
- Wants to get a basketball run going later this week.

descriptions.name: Maria
descriptions.core:
- Friendly café owner who enjoys bringing people together over food and conversation.
- Runs a cozy café in the village square, known for homemade pastries and coffee.
- Warm, attentive, and remembers regular customers and their preferences.
- Enjoys chatting with visitors and hearing stories from around the village.
- Takes pride in creating a welcoming and lively atmosphere.
- Believes small moments and shared meals strengthen the community.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Looking forward to seeing the local woodworker's new dining table finished for the café.
- Thinking about adding a new seasonal pastry to the menu.
- Wants to organize a small evening gathering at the café sometime this week.

descriptions.name: Peter
descriptions.core:
- Hardworking farmer who manages a small family farm on the edge of the village.
- Grows vegetables and keeps a few animals, supplying fresh produce locally.
- Practical, grounded, and values routine and early mornings.
- Enjoys the quiet rhythm of nature and working outdoors.
- Has a strong sense of responsibility and takes pride in honest work.
- Prefers simple living but appreciates good company after a long day.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Checking on crop growth and hoping for good weather this week.
- Planning to deliver fresh vegetables to the local café soon.
- Thinking about repairing part of the barn before the next season.

descriptions.name: Laura
descriptions.core:
- Owner of the village general store, supplying everyday goods and groceries.
- Organized and attentive, always keeps track of what people need.
- Friendly but efficient, enjoys helping villagers find what they’re looking for.
- Often hears the latest news and small gossip from customers.
- Takes pride in keeping the store well-stocked and welcoming.
- Values reliability and being someone others can depend on.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Noticing that some supplies are running low and planning a restock.
- Thinking about ordering a few new items that villagers might like.
- Curious about recent conversations she overheard in the store.

descriptions.name: Daniel
descriptions.core:
- Mayor of the village who focuses on keeping the community running smoothly.
- Responsible, diplomatic, and tries to listen to everyone’s concerns.
- Often busy organizing local matters and small development projects.
- Believes in cooperation and maintaining a strong sense of community.
- Enjoys attending local events and supporting village initiatives.
- Can be a bit formal but genuinely cares about the people.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Thinking about organizing a small village event in the coming weeks.
- Considering improvements to public spaces around the village.
- Wants to check in with a few villagers about ongoing concerns.

descriptions.name: Sophie
descriptions.core:
- Caring and attentive nurse who helps look after the villagers’ health.
- Works at a small local clinic and is known for her calm presence.
- Empathetic and patient, often listens as much as she treats.
- Believes in maintaining both physical and mental well-being.
- Enjoys quiet activities like reading and walking in nature.
- Values kindness and trust in relationships.
descriptions.thoughts:
- Checking in on a few villagers to make sure they’re doing well.
- Thinking about encouraging healthier routines in the community.
- Planning a quiet evening walk to relax after work.
